properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 109/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 M/V RAMFORM HYPERION IS CONDUCTING A SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATION IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:

 A. 66-11.3N 009-03.1E
 B. 64-39.2N 006-42.1E
 C. 64-58.9N 005-26.0E
 D. 66-31.5N 007-45.7E
 E. 66-11.3N 009-03.1E
  
 VESSEL IS TOWING 14 SEISMIC CABLES WITH A MAXIMUM LENGTH OF 6NM, WITH A TOTAL WIDTH OF 1 NM.
 WIDE BERTH IS REQUESTED, 3 NM FROM BOW, 3 NM BOTH SIDES AND 8 NM STERN.
 SUPPORT VESSELS,  M/V THOR OMEGA AND M/V MIRANDA IN ATTENDANCE.
 VHF WORKING CHANNELS ARE 67 AND 16.
